creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #2)

There is a "Pioneer FAQ", where some causes of mentioned (graphical) issues explained:
http://pioneerwiki.com/wiki/FAQ

It could be related to (integrated) video card used or not supported shaders, OpenGL version. In other words, specific to what hardware used. Not exlcuding, that it is a (software) bug, of course.
